lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and rust. The interior is heavily worn with torn upholstery. The car is currently non-functional and requires major mechanical repairs.
Good condition.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior paint and body are flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is in pristine condition with no signs of wear. The engine and transmission function as new.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. The engine runs roughly and has a persistent oil leak, while the transmission exhibits noticeable slipping. Externally, there is visible rust on the wheel wells and several deep scratches and dents across the body panels. The interior shows heavy wear, including tears in the upholstery and a non-functional air conditioning system. This car is being sold as-is and is recommended for someone looking for a major project or a source for parts.

Get ready for a great deal on this dependable ride! This vehicle has been well-loved and is still going strong, making it a perfect pick for someone who values functionality and character. It features some expected cosmetic wear and minor maintenance needs, but it offers a fantastic opportunity to own a reliable car at a budget-friendly price!

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver, though it does show signs of its age and mileage. The engine starts up consistently and the car handles well on the road, but the suspension is beginning to feel soft and will likely require attention in the coming year. Visually, the exterior has some noticeable clear coat peeling on the trunk and a few minor scuffs on the bumpers. The interior remains functional, though there is significant wear on the driver's side bolster and some minor staining on the rear floor mats. All major electronics are working, including the air conditioning, though the radio display has some dead pixels. It is a solid, honest car for someone who prioritizes mechanical functionality over cosmetic perfection.

This expertly maintained vehicle presents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning motorist. Demonstrating a consistent history of care and mechanical integrity, the automobile offers a balanced synthesis of performance and enduring value. Its well-preserved exterior and refined interior reflect a standard of excellence that ensures both reliability and a sophisticated presence on the road. We invite you to experience a vehicle that remains in commendable form, ready for immediate delivery.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty car, and she’s been such a joy to drive! It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-maintained, making it the perfect reliable companion for your daily commutes or weekend getaways. It runs like a dream and is ready to hit the road with a new owner today. Feel free to reach out if you want to come by and take a look!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering high-revving performance through individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. Power is managed by a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox and sent to the rear wheels via a mechanical limited-slip differential. The chassis remains taut with upgraded bushings, and the subframe has been proactively reinforced—a
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Runs reliably. Clean title.

This meticulously maintained 2018 luxury sedan strikes the perfect balance between performance and comfort. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, though a keen eye might spot a few minor stone chips consistent with careful highway use. Inside, the premium leather upholstery remains supple and free of tears, and every technological feature—from the crisp infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the vehicle is in excellent health; it has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, with a documented history of oil changes and a recent set of high-performance all-season tires. It drives straight and true, offering a quiet cabin and responsive handling. This is a smoke-free, garage-kept vehicle that provides a premium driving experience without the 'new car' price tag. Ready for its next owner to drive home today.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. This model offers a balanced combination of performance and comfort, having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure continued reliability. The interior remains in superior condition, reflecting a history of attentive ownership. For the discerning driver seeking exceptional value without compromising on professional standards, this offering represents a premier market opportunity.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, representing a premier choice for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent care and mechanical integrity, this automobile offers a refined driving experience and dependable performance. A sophisticated acquisition for those seeking quality and value in equal measure.

Hey there! I'm parting with my trusty ride, and it’s honestly been such a joy to drive. It's in really solid shape and has been super reliable for all my daily trips. It’s well-loved, well-maintained, and totally ready for its next adventure with you! Come take it for a spin—I think you're going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the legendary S54B32 inline-six, characterized by its individual throttle bodies and high-revving 8,000 RPM redline. Power is managed via a Getrag 420G six-speed manual gearbox and a variable M-differential for optimal torque distribution. This unit has undergone critical preventative maintenance, including rod bearing replacement and rear subframe reinforcement to ensure structural rigidity. The suspension maintains factory geometry with refreshed bushings, providing precise turn-in and tactile feedback through the rack-and-pinion steering. While the exterior shows honest signs of a life well-driven, the mechanical vitals are robust, with a linear power band and crisp Double VANOS engagement.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs smooth.

This meticulously maintained vehicle is the ideal choice for a discerning driver seeking both reliability and style. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish with only minor, age-appropriate road wear that does not detract from its impressive curb appeal. Inside, the cabin remains exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the premium upholstery is well-preserved, and all electronic features—from the dual-zone climate control to the high-fidelity sound system—operate flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, having followed a strict preventative maintenance schedule. It delivers a smooth, quiet ride with responsive handling and strong acceleration. With a complete service history and tires with significant tread remaining, this car is turn-key ready for its next owner.

This vehicle represents a refined acquisition for the discerning motorist, characterized by its mechanical integrity and consistent service history. Meticulously maintained to ensure optimal performance, it offers a sophisticated driving experience and remains in commendable aesthetic condition. A premier opportunity to secure a high-caliber automobile that balances prestige with exceptional functional value.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist. It offers a sophisticated driving experience and remains in commendable condition, standing as a testament to diligent previous ownership and engineering excellence.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and it's been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved and taken care of over the years. You’ll love how smooth it handles on the road! It's super reliable and ready for its next big adventure with a new owner. If you're looking for a dependable car that still looks great and feels right, this is definitely the one for you!

This FD3S features the legendary 13B-REW sequential twin-turbocharged rotary engine, delivering linear power through its sophisticated vacuum-actuated boost control system. The chassis remains taut, utilizing its original aluminum double-wishbone suspension geometry for exceptional lateral grip. Mechanical highlights include a crisp 5-speed manual gearbox and a Torsen limited-slip differential. Recent preventative maintenance focused on thermal management, including an upgraded aluminum radiator and verified cooling fan operation. Compression remains strong across both rotors, ensuring the apex seals are well within operational tolerances. Minor cosmetic patina consistent with age, but mechanically sorted for the spirited driver.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained. Reliable performance. Clean title.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect blend of reliability and style. The exterior presents beautifully with a deep, glossy finish, showing only the lightest signs of careful use consistent with a well-loved daily driver. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary—clean, smoke-free, and featuring supple upholstery with minimal wear. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is robust; it has been serviced strictly on schedule, ensuring a smooth engine note and precise, confident handling. Complete with a documented service history and tires in excellent condition, this car is ready to provide its next owner with years of dependable, high-quality performance.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, representing a superior balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and structurally sound, this automobile offers a refined driving experience consistent with our dealership's rigorous standards. Every mechanical component has been inspected to ensure continued reliability and integrity. This is an exceptional opportunity to acquire a well-preserved example of automotive excellence at a competitive valuation.

This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. Offering a seamless blend of comfort and utility, this automobile represents a superior acquisition for the discerning driver who values both heritage and functionality.

Hey there! Thanks for stopping by to check out my car! I’ve absolutely loved driving this beauty, and it’s still in really solid shape and ready for its next adventure. It runs like a charm and has been super reliable for me, making every trip a breeze. If you're looking for a dependable, well-cared-for ride that’s ready to hit the road today, you’ve found it! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions!

This E92 M3 features the legendary S65 4.0L V8, delivering linear power through eight individual throttle bodies up to its 8,400 RPM redline. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from a recently refreshed suspension with uprated bushings and a reinforced subframe. Mated to a precise 6-speed manual transmission, the mechanical feedback is exceptional, complemented by a variable M differential lock for optimal corner-exit traction. Rod bearings have been proactively addressed and the VANOS system is fully indexed, ensuring this high-revving masterpiece is mechanically sound and ready for the circuit or canyon roads.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Mechanically sound. Title in hand.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive condition both inside and out. The exterior retains its deep, original luster with only minor cosmetic signs of road use consistent with a well-cared-for daily driver. Step inside to find a pristine, smoke-free cabin featuring supple leather seating, a fully functional infotainment suite, and climate control that performs perfectly. Mechanically, this car is rock-solid; it has a documented service history, a smooth-shifting transmission, and a quiet, powerful engine with no leaks or warning lights. The tires have excellent tread depth, and the brakes are sharp and responsive. It offers a reliable, premium driving experience and is ready for its next owner to drive away with complete confidence.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this specimen offers a refined driving experience that exceeds standard expectations for its class. Every component has been thoroughly vetted to ensure reliable performance and enduring value, presenting a sophisticated balance of utility and prestige.
